◎简　　介  

　　The young Roland lives in 20 century Stockholm. His parents are Socialists. The family's tobacco business discussing politics and dad mom sells banned condoms. Roland may discover that it is not easy being viewed as a socialist and a Jew, either by peers or teachers.
